data.title: WIF price poised to hit $0.19 by mid-April 2026, currently at $0.18 with chance of 6% increase in two weeks amid mixed indicators.

data.title: Excess token supply jeopardizes crypto's value creation as it mars returns and severs link between fundamentals and price.
data.description: There has been a significant increase in the token supply, leading to a dilution of returns and disrupting the connection between fundamentals and price in the cryptocurrency market. This phenomenon is causing worries about the sustainability of the long-term model of crypto, with a growing number of tokens circulating in the market. The excessive supply is affecting the relationship between the value of these digital assets and their underlying fundamentals, prompting concerns among investors and analysts about the future direction of the industry.

Maintaining critical support at $1.66 is crucial to avoid a further drop below $1.60.
